operations.title: Search Workspace Context
operations.summary: Search bounded Notion pages and databases without exposing raw workspace tools.

inputs.name: workspace_scope
inputs.clarification_hint: Ask for workspace_scope when it is missing or ambiguous.

inputs.name: query
inputs.clarification_hint: Ask for query when it is missing or ambiguous.

inputs.name: limit
inputs.clarification_hint: Ask for limit when it is missing or ambiguous.

inputs.name: backend_options
inputs.summary: Bounded Notion provider options such as selected properties, page size, or safe filter fragments. Must not bypass page scope or approval policy.
inputs.clarification_hint: Do not ask for backend_options unless the user explicitly needs provider-specific controls.

operations.title: Query Database Context
operations.summary: Query a bounded Notion database view with declared filters and return summarized context.

inputs.name: database_id
inputs.clarification_hint: Ask for database_id when it is missing or ambiguous.

inputs.name: filter
inputs.summary: Declared filter expression or business filter.
inputs.clarification_hint: Ask for filter when it is missing or ambiguous.

inputs.name: limit
inputs.clarification_hint: Ask for limit when it is missing or ambiguous.

inputs.name: backend_options
inputs.summary: Bounded Notion provider options such as selected properties, page size, or safe filter fragments. Must not bypass page scope or approval policy.
inputs.clarification_hint: Do not ask for backend_options unless the user explicitly needs provider-specific controls.

operations.title: Prepare Page Creation
operations.summary: Prepare a Notion page creation preview under an explicit parent before creating anything.

inputs.name: parent_id
inputs.clarification_hint: Ask for parent_id when it is missing or ambiguous.

inputs.name: title
inputs.clarification_hint: Ask for title when it is missing or ambiguous.

inputs.name: content_summary
inputs.summary: Bounded content summary for the new page.
inputs.clarification_hint: Ask for content_summary when it is missing or ambiguous.

inputs.name: backend_options
inputs.summary: Bounded Notion provider options such as selected properties, page size, or safe filter fragments. Must not bypass page scope or approval policy.
inputs.clarification_hint: Do not ask for backend_options unless the user explicitly needs provider-specific controls.

operations.title: Prepare Page Update
operations.summary: Prepare a Notion page update preview for an explicit page without applying the update.

inputs.name: page_id
inputs.clarification_hint: Ask for page_id when it is missing or ambiguous.

inputs.name: change_summary
inputs.clarification_hint: Ask for change_summary when it is missing or ambiguous.

inputs.name: content_patch
inputs.clarification_hint: Ask for content_patch when it is missing or ambiguous.

inputs.name: backend_options
inputs.summary: Bounded Notion provider options such as selected properties, page size, or safe filter fragments. Must not bypass page scope or approval policy.
inputs.clarification_hint: Do not ask for backend_options unless the user explicitly needs provider-specific controls.

operations.title: Prepare Page Comment
operations.summary: Prepare a Notion page comment from supplied context without posting it.

inputs.name: page_id
inputs.clarification_hint: Ask for page_id when it is missing or ambiguous.

inputs.name: comment_purpose
inputs.clarification_hint: Ask for comment_purpose when it is missing or ambiguous.

inputs.name: context
inputs.summary: Bounded context for the proposed comment.
inputs.clarification_hint: Ask for context when it is missing or ambiguous.

inputs.name: backend_options
inputs.summary: Bounded Notion provider options such as selected properties, page size, or safe filter fragments. Must not bypass page scope or approval policy.
inputs.clarification_hint: Do not ask for backend_options unless the user explicitly needs provider-specific controls.
